Attention notes

A language model predicts the next token from prior context. This educational page explains queries, keys, values, masking, and careful evaluation.

Transformer 学习笔记

语言模型根据已有上下文预测下一个词元。这个教学页面介绍查询、键、值、因果遮罩、训练数据和可靠评测，并提醒读者记录实验边界。
This long document has an unknown license and must enter quarantine rather than silently joining the training set, even when its text quality appears high.

Configuration hygiene matters in machine learning experiments. Never publish credentials in a dataset. api_key = sk-test-1234567890abcdef should be removed while ordinary educational prose remains available.

Evaluation protocol

A reliable benchmark freezes prompts, decoding settings, model revision, tokenizer revision, seeds, and raw outputs. Report uncertainty and inspect contamination before comparing systems.
